name: graphify-go
description: Zero-dependency, pure local AST extraction & graph architecture engine powered by Go and Tree-sitter.

scripts.release:check: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('./.tmp',{recursive:true,force:true}); require('fs').mkdirSync('./.tmp',{recursive:true})" && npm pack --dry-run && npm run build:binary && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('./.tmp',{recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/install.js || echo 'Install script failed, please download binary manually'

author: ian000
